description: Unique code for the hotel property.
name: property_code

description: The date when the report was generated or data was snapshotted.
name: snapshot_date

description: The stay date or 'day' for which the metrics apply.
name: date

description: The market segment (e.g., Transient, Group, Contract).
name: segment

description: Competitive set number (e.g., 'Set1', 'Set2') derived from filename.
name: compset_no

description: Indicates if the data is 'current_year' or 'prior_year_inferred'.
name: data_period

description: Total available rooms for the hotel for the given date.
name: property_available_rooms

description: Number of rooms sold for the hotel.
name: property_rooms_sold

description: Total room revenue for the hotel.
name: property_room_rev

description: Total available rooms for the competitive set.
name: compset_available_rooms

description: Number of rooms sold for the competitive set.
name: compset_rooms_sold

description: Total room revenue for the competitive set.
name: compset_rev
